mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_token (username, token, created_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{token}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_token WHERE username = #{username} AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_token WHERE expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_token WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_token SET expires_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_token WHERE expires_at > NOW()
